message:
chore: refresh bd-1now.4.7 telemetry performance raw output

Update telemetry_perf_raw_output.txt with latest performance measurement
pass results from the telemetry bridge benchmark suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
